repo_purpose: Shinobi: an autonomous agent toolkit providing release monitoring (Hermes/GitHub), abort controls, path/command safety utilities, and validation/audit scripts for self-analysis and repo reads.
architecture_summary:
## Overview
Shinobi appears to be a TypeScript/Node.js autonomous agent framework. The readable portions reveal two main code areas:

- **`src/`**: Core runtime utilities including a Hermes release watcher (GitHub polling + state persistence), a Windows ESC kill-switch (via PowerShell child process), path/permission validation, and a synchronous command runner.
- **`scripts/`**: Smoke tests and audit runners (a3/a4/b1 suite) that exercise CLI parsers (`parseReadArgs`, `parseSelfArgs`) and run `/read` and `/self` audits, depending internally on `src/reader/cli.js` and `src/reader/self.js`.

## Coverage Gaps
Several top-level paths could not be analyzed:
- Root `/`, `docs/`, and `misc/` sub-reports failed validation twice (key_files schema).
- `missions/` timed out repeatedly (90s) across all scan attempts — its contents are entirely undetermined.

## Notable Inference
Scripts reference `src/reader/cli.js` and `src/reader/self.js`, but the `src/` sub-report did not enumerate a `reader/` subfolder — either it exists but was not reported, or there is an unresolved internal reference.

modules.name: missions
modules.responsibility: Mission configuration and runtime logic for Shinobi autonomous agent (contents unverified — scan timed out).

modules.name: src
modules.responsibility: Core utilities: Hermes release watcher, ESC kill-switch, path/permission validation, and synchronous command execution.

modules.name: scripts
modules.responsibility: Smoke tests and audit runners for /read and /self flows; validates CLI parsers and executes full-repo audits.

risks.description: missions/ directory timed out at 90s on all scan attempts; entire module unanalyzed — major coverage gap in architecture understanding.
Root / sub-report unreadable (validation failed twice on key_files schema); no package.json, license, or top-level config verified.
docs/ sub-report unreadable (validation failed twice); documentation structure and completeness unknown.
misc/ sub-report unreadable (validation failed twice); contents and purpose undetermined.
scripts/ references src/reader/cli.js and src/reader/self.js, but src/ sub-report lists no reader/ subdirectory — possible missing module or unreported path.
src/utils/runner.ts uses execSync without timeout; vulnerable to hanging on long-running commands (per src sub-report).
src/watchers/hermes_watcher.ts has no rate-limiting on GitHub API; risks hitting 60 req/hr unauthenticated limit if interval reduced.
scripts/a4_run.ts hardcodes Windows paths (C:\\Users\\angel\\Desktop\\*); non-portable across OS/machines.
scripts/a4_run.ts silently catches read failures with empty catch blocks; errors go unlogged per scripts sub-report.
src/utils/permissions.ts sensitive-paths list incomplete for Linux (missing /home, /root, /var variants per src sub-report).
src/watchers/hermes_watcher.ts silently truncates release body to 4000 chars without logging the truncation.
